subcodes.title: The Eleventh Principle—The Power of the Holy Spirit: Words spoken on 1911-11-18 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: In the teaching of Baha'u'llah, it is written: 'By the Power of the Holy Spirit alone is man able to progress, for the power of man is limited and the Divine Power is boundless.'... Turn your faces away from the contemplation
subcodes.first_line_orig: از جمله تعالیم حضرت بهاء الله این است بشر هر قدر ترقی بکند باز محتاج بنفثات
subcodes.subjects: @The Holy Spirit, @Greek philosophers; Greek civilization, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @spiritual transformation
